How you're charged: Subscription unlocks lead access. PORTDA also takes 5% commission when a lead converts to a confirmed order. Both apply.

Pro · Quarterly

What's included
①
Subscription · Pro Quarterly
₹12,999 every 3 months · auto-renews · grants access to 200 leads / month + premium leads.
②
Commission · 5% on conversions
Applies to every confirmed order. Deducted automatically from your settlement. No commission on leads you don't win.
